---
title: "Learning"
toc: false
---

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

OWNER = "PierpaoloV"
REPO = "learning"
RAW = `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/${OWNER}/${REPO}/main`
API = `https://api.github.com/repos/${OWNER}/${REPO}`

// Fetch full file tree once to know what exists
treeJson = fetch(`${API}/git/trees/main?recursive=1`).then(r => r.json())
existingPaths = new Set((treeJson.tree || []).map(f => f.path))

async function fetchRaw(path) {
  try {
    const r = await fetch(`${RAW}/${path}`)
    if (!r.ok) return null
    return await r.text()
  } catch { return null }
}

function isSolved(content) {
  if (!content) return false
  const lines = content.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() && !l.trim().startsWith('#') && !l.startsWith('from ') && !l.startsWith('import ') && !l.startsWith('class ') && !l.includes('Optional') && !l.includes('List'))
  const body = lines.join('').replace(/\s/g, '')
  return body !== '' && !body.endsWith('pass') && !body.includes('Writeyoursolutionhere')
}

function isWritten(content) {
  if (!content) return false
  return content.trim().length > 80 && !content.includes('Write your design here') && !content.includes('Write your solution here')
}

// Monthly schedule
schedule = ({
  year: 2026,
  monthLabel: "April – May 2026",
  weekStarts: ["2026-04-18","2026-04-25","2026-05-02","2026-05-09"],
  weeks: [
    {
      label: "Week 1 · Apr 18–24",
      problems: [
        { slug: "0001-two-sum", title: "Two Sum", difficulty: "Easy" }
      ],
      systemDesign: null,
      cards: { count: 10, topics: "attention, backprop, batch norm, transformer, bias-variance, loss functions, RAG, MIL, optimizers, RLHF" }
    },
    {
      label: "Week 2 · Apr 25 – May 1",
      problems: [
        { slug: "0217-contains-duplicate", title: "Contains Duplicate", difficulty: "Easy" },
        { slug: "0049-group-anagrams", title: "Group Anagrams", difficulty: "Medium" },
        { slug: "0238-product-of-array-except-self", title: "Product Except Self", difficulty: "Medium" }
      ],
      systemDesign: { slug: "url-shortener", title: "URL Shortener" },
      cards: { count: 5, topics: "dropout, CNN, precision/recall, KV cache, transfer learning & LoRA" }
    },
    {
      label: "Week 3 · May 2–8",
      problems: [
        { slug: "0125-valid-palindrome", title: "Valid Palindrome", difficulty: "Easy" },
        { slug: "0015-3sum", title: "3Sum", difficulty: "Medium" },
        { slug: "0020-valid-parentheses", title: "Valid Parentheses", difficulty: "Easy" }
      ],
      systemDesign: { slug: "key-value-store", title: "Key-Value Store" },
      cards: { count: 3, topics: "vanishing gradient, data augmentation, ML system design" }
    },
    {
      label: "Week 4 · May 9–15",
      problems: [
        { slug: "0121-best-time-to-buy-sell-stock", title: "Best Time to Buy Stock", difficulty: "Easy" },
        { slug: "0003-longest-substring-without-repeating", title: "Longest Substring No Repeat", difficulty: "Medium" },
        { slug: "0206-reverse-linked-list", title: "Reverse Linked List", difficulty: "Easy" }
      ],
      systemDesign: { slug: "rate-limiter", title: "Rate Limiter" },
      cards: { count: 2, topics: "contrastive learning, LLM agents" }
    }
  ]
})

// Determine current week (0-indexed)
currentWeekIdx = {
  const today = new Date()
  const starts = schedule.weekStarts.map(s => new Date(s))
  let idx = 0
  for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
    if (today >= starts[i]) idx = i
  }
  return idx
}

// Fetch all solution + review statuses in parallel
allProblems = schedule.weeks.flatMap(w => w.problems)

problemStatuses = Promise.all(
  allProblems.map(async p => {
    const paths = await existingPaths
    const content = await fetchRaw(`leetcode/${p.slug}/solution.py`)
    const solved = isSolved(content)
    const reviewed = paths.has(`leetcode/${p.slug}/review.md`)
    const reviewContent = reviewed ? await fetchRaw(`leetcode/${p.slug}/review.md`) : null
    return { slug: p.slug, solved, reviewed, reviewContent }
  })
)

statusMap = Object.fromEntries(problemStatuses.map(s => [s.slug, s]))

// Fetch system design statuses
allDesigns = schedule.weeks.filter(w => w.systemDesign).map(w => w.systemDesign)

designStatuses = Promise.all(
  allDesigns.map(async d => {
    const content = await fetchRaw(`system-design/${d.slug}/design.md`)
    return { slug: d.slug, written: isWritten(content) }
  })
)

designMap = Object.fromEntries(designStatuses.map(d => [d.slug, d]))

// Progress calculations
weekProgress = {
  const sm = await statusMap
  const week = schedule.weeks[currentWeekIdx]
  const total = week.problems.length
  const solved = week.problems.filter(p => sm[p.slug]?.solved).length
  return { solved, total, pct: total > 0 ? Math.round(solved / total * 100) : 0 }
}

monthProgress = {
  const sm = await statusMap
  const total = allProblems.length
  const solved = allProblems.filter(p => sm[p.slug]?.solved).length
  return { solved, total, pct: total > 0 ? Math.round(solved / total * 100) : 0 }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Render helpers
function diffBadge(d) {
  const colors = { Easy: "#22c55e", Medium: "#f59e0b", Hard: "#ef4444" }
  return `<span style="background:${colors[d]||'#6b7280'};color:white;padding:1px 8px;border-radius:99px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;">${d}</span>`
}

function statusIcon(ok) {
  return ok ? `<span style="color:#22c55e;font-size:1rem;">✅</span>`
             : `<span style="color:var(--lp-status-empty);font-size:1rem;">⬜</span>`
}

function bar(pct, label, sub) {
  return `
  <div style="margin-bottom:1.1rem;">
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:5px;">
      <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;">${label}</span>
      <span style="color:var(--lp-text-muted);font-size:0.85rem;">${sub}</span>
    </div>
    <div style="background:var(--lp-progress-bg);border-radius:999px;height:13px;overflow:hidden;">
      <div style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--lp-accent),var(--lp-accent-soft));width:${pct}%;height:100%;border-radius:999px;transition:width 0.6s ease;min-width:${pct>0?'6px':'0'};"></div>
    </div>
  </div>`
}

function reviewBlock(content) {
  if (!content) return ''
  const preview = content.slice(0, 1800) + (content.length > 1800 ? '\n...' : '')
  return `
  <details style="margin-top:6px;">
    <summary style="cursor:pointer;color:var(--lp-accent);font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;user-select:none;">📝 Grader feedback</summary>
    <div style="background:var(--lp-panel-muted);border-left:3px solid var(--lp-accent);padding:0.75rem 1rem;margin-top:6px;font-size:0.78rem;white-space:pre-wrap;font-family:'Fira Mono',monospace;line-height:1.5;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;overflow-x:auto;color:var(--lp-text-soft);">${preview.replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;')}</div>
  </details>`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

// Render full page
{
  const sm = await statusMap
  const dm = await designMap
  const wp = await weekProgress
  const mp = await monthProgress

  const weekLabel = schedule.weeks[currentWeekIdx].label

  let html_out = `
  <div style="max-width:860px;margin:auto;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif;">

    <!-- Progress bars -->
    <div style="background:var(--lp-panel-bg);border:1px solid var(--lp-border);border-radius:14px;padding:1.5rem 1.75rem;margin-bottom:2rem;box-shadow:var(--lp-shadow);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);">
      <h3 style="margin:0 0 1.2rem;font-size:1rem;color:var(--lp-text-soft);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;">📊 Progress</h3>
      ${bar(wp.pct, `This week — ${weekLabel}`, `${wp.solved} / ${wp.total} problems`)}
      ${bar(mp.pct, `Month 1 — ${schedule.monthLabel}`, `${mp.solved} / ${mp.total} problems · ${schedule.weeks.flatMap(w=>w.problems).filter(p=>sm[p.slug]?.reviewed).length} reviewed`)}
    </div>

    <!-- Year -->
    <details open>
    <summary style="cursor:pointer;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;padding:0.4rem 0;list-style:none;">
      📁 2026
    </summary>
    <div style="padding-left:1.25rem;margin-top:0.5rem;">

      <!-- Month -->
      <details open>
      <summary style="cursor:pointer;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.35rem 0;color:var(--lp-text-soft);">
        📅 ${schedule.monthLabel}
      </summary>
      <div style="padding-left:1rem;margin-top:0.5rem;">
  `

  for (let wi = 0; wi < schedule.weeks.length; wi++) {
    const week = schedule.weeks[wi]
    const solved = week.problems.filter(p => sm[p.slug]?.solved).length
    const total = week.problems.length
    const icon = solved === total ? "✅" : solved > 0 ? "🔄" : "⬜"
    const isOpen = wi === currentWeekIdx ? "open" : ""

    html_out += `
      <details ${isOpen} style="margin-bottom:1rem;border:1px solid var(--lp-border);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--lp-panel-bg);">
      <summary style="cursor:pointer;font-size:0.97rem;font-weight:600;padding:0.75rem 1rem;background:var(--lp-panel-soft);color:var(--lp-text);list-style:none;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5rem;">
        <span>${icon}</span>
        <span>${week.label}</span>
        <span style="margin-left:auto;color:var(--lp-text-muted);font-weight:400;font-size:0.85rem;">${solved}/${total} solved</span>
      </summary>
      <div style="padding:1rem 1.25rem;">

        <!-- LeetCode -->
        <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--lp-text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.07em;margin:0 0 0.6rem;">💻 LeetCode</p>
        <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.86rem;margin-bottom:1.25rem;color:var(--lp-text-soft);">
          <thead>
            <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid var(--lp-border);color:var(--lp-text-muted);font-size:0.8rem;">
              <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;font-weight:600;">Problem</th>
              <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:left;font-weight:600;">Difficulty</th>
              <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">Solved</th>
              <th style="padding:5px 8px;text-align:center;font-weight:600;">Reviewed</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>`

    for (const p of week.problems) {
      const s = sm[p.slug] || {}
      html_out += `
            <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--lp-border-soft);">
              <td style="padding:8px 8px;vertical-align:top;">
                <a href="https://github.com/PierpaoloV/learning/tree/main/leetcode/${p.slug}" target="_blank" style="color:var(--lp-accent);font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;">${p.title}</a>
                ${reviewBlock(s.reviewContent)}
              </td>
              <td style="padding:8px 8px;vertical-align:top;">${diffBadge(p.difficulty)}</td>
              <td style="padding:8px 8px;text-align:center;vertical-align:top;">${statusIcon(s.solved)}</td>
              <td style="padding:8px 8px;text-align:center;vertical-align:top;">${statusIcon(s.reviewed)}</td>
            </tr>`
    }

    html_out += `
          </tbody>
        </table>

        <!-- Flashcards -->
        <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--lp-text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.07em;margin:0 0 0.4rem;">🧠 Flashcards</p>
        <p style="font-size:0.86rem;color:var(--lp-text-soft);margin:0 0 1.1rem;"><strong>${week.cards.count} new cards</strong> — ${week.cards.topics}</p>

        <!-- System Design -->
        <p style="font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--lp-text-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.07em;margin:0 0 0.4rem;">🏗️ System Design</p>`

    if (week.systemDesign) {
      const d = dm[week.systemDesign.slug] || {}
      html_out += `
        <p style="font-size:0.86rem;color:var(--lp-text-soft);margin:0;">
          <a href="https://github.com/PierpaoloV/learning/tree/main/system-design/${week.systemDesign.slug}" target="_blank" style="color:var(--lp-accent);font-weight:500;text-decoration:none;">${week.systemDesign.title}</a>
          &nbsp;${statusIcon(d.written)}
        </p>`
    } else {
      html_out += `<p style="font-size:0.86rem;color:var(--lp-text-faint);margin:0;">—</p>`
    }

    html_out += `
      </div>
      </details>`
  }

  html_out += `
      </div>
      </details>
    </div>
    </details>

  </div>`

  const container = document.createElement("div");
  container.innerHTML = html_out;
  return container;
}
```
